title: Dada Darbar
tagline: Dada Darbar — spiritual town of Madhya Pradesh

overview.short: Dada Darbar is a Hindu Temple in Khandwa, Nimar region, Madhya Pradesh, India.
overview.description: Dada Darbar is a Hindu Temple in Khandwa, Nimar region, Madhya Pradesh, India. It is named after Dadaji Dhuniwale. Dada Darbar is built at the memorial place of Dadaji Dhuniwale. There are innumerable devotees of 'Dadaji' in India.

topPlaces.name: Nimar
topPlaces.description: Nimar or Nimad is the southwestern region of Madhya Pradesh state in west-central India. This region includes sub-regions such as Khargone, Khandwa, Barwani, Burhanpur, and the southern parts of Dhar.

topPlaces.name: Khandwa
topPlaces.description: Khandwa is a city and a nagar nigam in the Nimar region of Madhya Pradesh, India. It is the administrative headquarters of the Khandwa district, formerly known as East Nimar District.

topPlaces.name: Diocese of Khandwa
topPlaces.description: The Roman Catholic Diocese of Khandwa (Latin: Khandvaën(sis)) is a diocese located in the city of Khandwa in the ecclesiastical province of Bhopal in India.

items.note: Nimar or Nimad is the southwestern region of Madhya Pradesh state in west-central India. This region includes sub-regions such as Khargone, Khandwa, Barwani, Burhanpur, and the southern parts of Dhar.
Khandwa is a city and a nagar nigam in the Nimar region of Madhya Pradesh, India. It is the administrative headquarters of the Khandwa district, formerly known as East Nimar District.
The Roman Catholic Diocese of Khandwa (Latin: Khandvaën(sis)) is a diocese located in the city of Khandwa in the ecclesiastical province of Bhopal in India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Dada Darbar?
faq.a: The best time to visit Dada Darbar is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Dada Darbar?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Devi Ahilya Bai Holkar Airport, Indore (114 km) and the nearest railway station is Itarsi Junction (171 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Dada Darbar?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Dada Darbar at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Dada Darbar?
faq.a: Stays in Dada Darbar start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Dada Darbar?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nimar, Khandwa, Diocese of Khandwa.
